items.title: 'Make a choice': Taylor defends comments aimed at non-citizens

children.content: Opposition Leader Angus Taylor has defended his comments aimed at non-citizens as necessary and practical during a heated interview on 7.30.

articles.title: Business groups lament migration plan as Taylor speaks

children.content: The Coalition wants to limit Australia's net migration intake to only one person per new home built, but businesses say the economy needs a "sustainable" migration program.

image.altText: Close up of house under construction, frame and windows, no walls, no workers in shot.

articles.title: Coalition proposes plan to end tax bracket creep

children.content: The Coalition has made a bold play to win back voters with a plan to automatically index income tax brackets to keep up with inflation.

items.title: Leadership contenders edge towards challenging UK PM Starmer

items.title: Here's how the Coles Down Down campaign duped shoppers

children.content: The pricing patterns of these six products show how Coles was found to have misled consumers through its Down Down pricing patterns.

items.title: ICC fugitive flees Philippine Senate after shooting chaos

children.content: Senator Ronald dela Rosa, who is wanted by the International Criminal Court on charges of crimes against humanity, had been holed up inside the Philippine Senate since Monday to avoid arrest. His whereabouts is now unknown.

image.altText: A close up photo of a man with his mouth open.

items.title: The key takeaways from Trump and Xi's meeting in China

items.title: Email reveals Jewish group warned police about Bondi gunman in 2019

items.title: Power to cut funding and stricter 'permanence' test under new NDIS

items.title: Prime minister concedes aged care wait times 'not good enough'
